naturalLanguageQuery: who are all managers and what controls are they responsible for
generatedSQL:
SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short" 
FROM "allTeams" t 
JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" 
WHERE t."role" ILIKE '%manager%';
